recommendations.title: The Bridge

recommendations.title: Avatar: Creating the World of Pandora
recommendations.overview: The Making-of James Cameron's Avatar. It shows interesting parts of the work on the set.

recommendations.title: Money Shot: The Pornhub Story
recommendations.overview: Featuring interviews with performers, activists and past employees, this documentary offers a deep dive into the successes and scandals of Pornhub.

recommendations.title: Money Heist: The Phenomenon
recommendations.overview: A documentary on why 'Money Heist' sparked a wave of enthusiasm around the world for a lovable group of thieves and their professor.

recommendations.title: Expedition Happiness
recommendations.overview: A German couple and their dog travel across North America in a school bus searching for a state of pure bliss.

recommendations.title: All About Actresses
recommendations.overview: A director wants to make a documentary about actresses, all actresses: the popular ones, the unknown ones, the intellectuals, the comedians, the forgotten ones... Filming everything, with or without their consent, the director gets caught up in the g

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: Olympia Part One: Festival of the Nations

recommendations.title: No Half Measures: Creating the Final Season of Breaking Bad
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the making of season five of the acclaimed AMC series Breaking Bad.
